name: Claude Code Headless Run
description: Run the Claude Code CLI unattended against a repo on a schedule with a fixed prompt. Non-interactive (`-p`), fenced by `--permission-mode dontAsk`, scoped to the tools you list, output captured to a log.

parameters.label: Repository path
parameters.help: Absolute path to the local git repository.

parameters.label: Prompt
parameters.help: The instruction Claude runs each time. Avoid single quotes (they close the PowerShell string).

parameters.label: Allowed tools
parameters.help: Comma-separated Claude Code tool allowlist, e.g. Read,Grep,Glob or Bash(git log *),Edit. dontAsk still auto-denies anything not listed. See the Claude Code --allowedTools docs for the exact syntax.

parameters.label: Max turns
parameters.help: Abort the run after this many agentic turns (bounds runtime and cost).

parameters.label: Log file path
parameters.help: Where the run output (Claude's printed result + any errors) is captured.
